The layout comprises five well-proportioned bedrooms, five bathrooms, and three balconies, providing ample privacy and flexibility for larger families. The living and dining areas are combined, creating a spacious central zone suited for both everyday living and entertaining. The apartment is east-facing, Vaastu compliant, and finished with vitrified tile flooring throughout. The kitchen is modular and fitted with a chimney, with a piped gas connection available. The property is fully furnished and also includes additional rooms such as a puja room, study, store room, and servant room, enhancing overall functionality.FacilitiesThe building is equipped with two lifts for convenient vertical movement. The apartment benefits from 24-hour water supply and reliable power conditions with no or rare power cuts. Two covered car parking spaces are allotted to the unit. Security is well managed through the presence of a security guard and CCTV surveillance, ensuring a safe residential environment.LocalitySeawoods is one of Navi Mumbais most sought-after residential areas, known for its excellent infrastructure and connectivity. The property enjoys close proximity, within approximately 500 metres, to essential amenities such as hospitals, malls, supermarkets, banks, public transport options, railway connectivity, and metro access, supporting a highly convenient urban lifestyle.AmenitiesThe NRI Complex Phase 1 is a well-planned residential development offering a wide range of modern amenities. Landscaped open spaces, recreational facilities, and community-focused features contribute to a balanced living environment suitable for families.Ideal Occupier ProfileThis spacious apartment is ideally suited for large families or buyers seeking a premium, ready-to-move residence in a well-established society with strong connectivity and comprehensive amenities in Seawoods, Navi Mumbai.

resultList.dtldesc: Experience a blend of luxury and comfort in this stunning 3 BHK apartment located in the prestigious Arihant Clan Aalishan project in Kharghar. Situated on the 47th floor of a magnificent 51-storey tower, this residence offers breathtaking panoramic views and a serene living environment. The property is designed to provide an elite lifestyle with its modern architecture and thoughtful planning, making it an ideal choice for families seeking a sophisticated home in Navi Mumbai.::::Property Specifications::This spacious apartment features a super area of 1,350 sq. ft and is currently under construction, offering a fresh start for its future residents. The layout includes three well-proportioned bedrooms and three modern bathrooms, ensuring privacy and convenience for all family members. Additionally, three balconies provide ample natural light and cross-ventilation throughout the living spaces. The unit is unfurnished, allowing you the creative freedom to design the interiors according to your personal taste and requirements.::::Facilities::Residents of this exclusive development have access to an extensive array of world-class amenities designed for recreation and wellness. The complex includes a large clubhouse, a swimming pool with water slides, a private mini cinema theatre, and a well-equipped gymnasium. For relaxation, there is a health club with a steam and jacuzzi, as well as a dedicated meditation area. Practical facilities include high-speed service and goods lifts, 24-hour security, power backup, and reserved parking. The project also features theme-based architecture, a jogging track, and multi-purpose courts for sports enthusiasts.::::Locality::The property is situated in the vibrant neighbourhood of Sector 37, Kharghar, which is known for its excellent infrastructure and connectivity. The Pethpada Metro Station and Kharghar Railway Station are within close proximity, facilitating easy commutes to different parts of the city. Educational institutions such as the Convent of Jesus & Mary High School and the National Institute of Fashion Technology are easily accessible. For shopping and entertainment, residents can visit the nearby Glomax Mall and Little World Mall. The area is well-serviced by essential utilities and public transport, making it a highly sought-after residential destination.
